# MuseAI by GuideQR.ai

MuseAI is an AI voice guide platform for museums.
Visitors scan a QR code and get real-time, multilingual voice guidance in browser (no app install).

## Canonical Site
- https://guideqr.ai

## Core Product
- Real-time AI voice guide for museum exhibits
- QR-first access (no app installation)
- Multilingual support: Vietnamese, English, Spanish, French, Japanese, Korean, Chinese
- Camera-based exhibit recognition
- Grounded responses from museum-approved knowledge base
- Admin CMS for museums (museum management, exhibit content, analytics, QR generation)

## Primary Pages
- Landing: https://guideqr.ai/
- Welcome (museum entry): https://guideqr.ai/welcome
- Camera tour: https://guideqr.ai/camera-tour
- Exhibit detail: https://guideqr.ai/exhibit/{exhibit_id}
- Admin login: https://guideqr.ai/admin/login

## Audience
- B2C: museum visitors
- B2B: museum directors, operations managers, curators

## Positioning
- Premium digital museum experience
- Fast deployment for museums
- Lower operating costs compared to full human-guide coverage

## Brand Keywords
- MuseAI
- GuideQR.ai
- AI museum guide
- museum voice assistant
- QR museum experience

## Contact
- hello@guideqr.ai
